feedback.text: Hello, I believe that protection for multiple forms of digital media should be added to this act, like videogames, movies, music etc. Companies are making alot of media inaccessible due to them either deeming them unprofitable or wanting consumers to buy something new. I believe this is pretty bad, at least artistically. Having media become freeware if the publisher's don't want to sell or maintain a piece of media could be a solution. Thank you if you took your time reading. (:
